title: Unified Provider / Account / Workspace data model + vault schema v2
description: Introduce canonical Provider/Account/Workspace types. accounts.json schemaVersion bumps from v1 (bare array) to v2 ({schemaVersion: 2, accounts: Account[]}). Account becomes a discriminated union: {kind: 'oauth' | 'apikey' | 'none'}. One-shot migration runs on first load: every workspace (OAuth + API-key + local) gets a vault entry. Per-workspace 'sweech-api-key' keychain entries are retained as legacy mirrors — the underlying CLI binaries (claude, codex) read them.

context.text: Shipped via commit e1cfdf8 (worktree T-070) + merge 09dff54 + restore-merge 366115f. +442 lines src/providerModel.ts, +467/-6 src/vault.ts, +605 tests/providerModel.test.ts. 26 new tests. Migration verified intact against backup at ~/sweech-backups/pre-provider-unification-20260517-010713.

acceptanceCriteria: src/providerModel.ts exports Provider, Account (oauth | apikey | none), Workspace types ✓
accounts.json schemaVersion bumped (was 1, now 2); migration on load converts old shape + API-key keychain entries to new shape ✓
Resolver: collectProviderTree() returns Provider[] with nested accounts and workspaces ✓
Unit tests cover the migration path on a fixture accounts.json + mocked keychain entries ✓ (26 tests)
